channel.title: Zeitschrift für Naturforschung C
channel.description: A RSS feed containing the latest articles published in Zeitschrift für Naturforschung C

item.title: Frontmatter
item.description: Article by Arzu Öztürk Kesebir, Ziya Dağalan, Pınar Güller, Bilal Nişancı, Ömer İrfan Küfrevioğlu DOI: https://doi.org/10.1515/znc-2025-frontmatter1-2

item.title: An overview on glycoside hydrolases and glycosyltransferases
item.description: Article by Arzu Öztürk Kesebir, Ziya Dağalan, Pınar Güller, Bilal Nişancı, Ömer İrfan Küfrevioğlu DOI: https://doi.org/10.1515/znc-2024-2002

item.title: Production, purification, and determination of the biochemical properties of β-glucosidase in Trichoderma koningii via solid substrate fermentation
item.description: Article by Arzu Öztürk Kesebir, Ziya Dağalan, Pınar Güller, Bilal Nişancı, Ömer İrfan Küfrevioğlu DOI: https://doi.org/10.1515/znc-2024-0026

item.title: Comparison of lignocellulosic enzymes and CAZymes between ascomycetes (Trichoderma) and basidiomycetes (Ganoderma) species: a proteomic approach
item.description: Article by Arzu Öztürk Kesebir, Ziya Dağalan, Pınar Güller, Bilal Nişancı, Ömer İrfan Küfrevioğlu DOI: https://doi.org/10.1515/znc-2023-0125

item.title: In vitro inhibition potency of malononitrile derivatives on the activity of two pentose phosphate pathway enzymes: accompanied by molecular docking evaluation
item.description: Article by Arzu Öztürk Kesebir, Ziya Dağalan, Pınar Güller, Bilal Nişancı, Ömer İrfan Küfrevioğlu DOI: https://doi.org/10.1515/znc-2023-0164
